requirements.title: Application Root Structure
requirements.description: The application root shall embed a module root with an API vtable pointer.
requirements.rationale: The application root provides the standard vtable-based interface that the scheduler and other framework components use to invoke application lifecycle hooks polymorphically.

requirements.title: OnStart Lifecycle Hook
requirements.description: The application API vtable shall define an OnStart operation called once to initialize resources.
requirements.rationale: OnStart provides a one-time initialization point for applications to set up resources before the scheduler begins periodic execution.

requirements.title: OnProcess Lifecycle Hook
requirements.description: The application API vtable shall define an OnProcess operation that may be invoked repeatedly.
requirements.rationale: OnProcess is the primary execution hook invoked by the scheduler on each minor frame, providing the periodic processing entry point for application logic.

requirements.title: OnExit Lifecycle Hook
requirements.description: The application API vtable shall define an OnExit operation called once prior to shutdown.
requirements.rationale: OnExit provides a cleanup point for applications to release or reset resources before shutdown, ensuring orderly termination.
